positive: Minimalist stylized watercolor mountain range silhouette, embracing vibrant autumn color palette of deep crimson, burnt orange, and ochre. The composition should be centered, featuring three overlapping, distinct peaks with varied textures and layered depth. Incorporate subtle botanical elements like stylized ferns and clusters of berries at the base of the mountains. The style must be clean, high-contrast, and scalable for apparel printing, resembling fine art linework mixed with watercolor wash effects. Use clean, strong outlines for maximum pop against a solid garment color.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, cluttered, blurry, noise, grainy, low contrast, extra limbs, bad anatomy, duplicate, artifacts
